scripts.build: npx tsc -p packages/gamekit && npx tsc -p packages/gamekit-server
scripts.test:net: npm run build:gamekit && bun test tests/net/
scripts.demo:pong: npm run build && npm run dev -w gamekit-pong
scripts.release:dry: npm run build && npm publish --dry-run -w @cjgammon/gamekit -w @cjgammon/gamekit-server -w create-gamekit
scripts.release: npm run build && npm publish -w @cjgammon/gamekit && npm publish -w @cjgammon/gamekit-server && npm publish -w create-gamekit
